form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 9th (Fr5) over 2138m after showing early pace at this track beaten 8 m by Moops (2:33.90) in 3yo+ NR up to 70 on March 31 at $3.30. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 1.75 m as favourite (Sr1) at this track (2:35.80) beating Barrett in 3yo+ NR 48 to 55 on March 24 at $1.85. Rates highly. Winning prospects.

Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: 11-year-old gelding showed improvement last start. Posted a big 16 m win when driven back in the field, (Fr6) held up early, at this track (2:32.30) beating Tilly Jayne in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 27 at $13. The race before was not as impressive when beaten by 7 m finishing eighth after a quick start, behind Cool Night at this track over 1660m in a 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better on March 21 at $51. Each way hope.

form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Bathurst both over 1730m. Last start won by 2.5 m as favourite (Fr5) at Bathurst (2:02.60) beating Alwaysbmypony in No NR on March 25 at $2.80. Expected to go well again.
